summary: Comprehensive frontend audit of Kain Nusantara ERP/WMS across all 4 roles (admin, sales, manager, warehouse) on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844 for sales). Tested navigation, UI/UX consistency, data display, empty states, and cross-page behavior. Found 1 CRITICAL issue (duplicate page headers affecting ALL pages), 2 HIGH severity issues (persistent login notice, entity switcher duplication), and multiple MEDIUM/LOW UI/UX polish issues. OLD bugs #1, #2, #4 from BUG_BACKLOG.md are FIXED. Bugs #3, #5, #6, #7 require verification with more detailed navigation testing.

critical_bugs.issue: DUPLICATE PAGE HEADER on ALL pages - page title appears twice (once in TopBar, once in content header)
critical_bugs.affected_pages: ALL pages (Control Tower, Pusat Persetujuan, Performa Saya, Operasi Gudang, Dashboard & Analytics, etc.)
critical_bugs.example: Control Tower page shows 'BERANDA · EKSEKUTIF Control Tower' in top bar AND 'EKSEKUTIF Control Tower' in content area
critical_bugs.root_cause: TopBar renders kicker+title AND page content renders kicker+title again - need to remove one
critical_bugs.verification: Confirmed on admin, sales, manager, warehouse roles

ui_bugs.issue: Persistent login success notice 'Login berhasil sebagai [role]' stays visible permanently
ui_bugs.recommendation: Make notice dismissible or auto-hide after 3-5 seconds

ui_bugs.issue: Entity switcher 'Semua Entitas' appears TWICE - once in TopBar (top right) and once in content header
ui_bugs.affected_pages: Pages with entity context (Control Tower, etc.)
ui_bugs.recommendation: Remove entity switcher from content header, keep only in TopBar

ui_bugs.issue: None - mobile sales app works correctly on 390x844 viewport
ui_bugs.details: All 5 tabs (Beranda, Katalog, Keranjang, Pesanan, Lainnya) work correctly. CRM sub-page renders at correct width (390px). No horizontal overflow detected.

old_bugs_status.description: Dashboard cards leaking to all pages
old_bugs_status.verification: Dashboard metric cards only appear on home views (admin-home, sales-home, reports, operations). Tested on Pusat Persetujuan, Approval Harga, and other pages - no dashboard cards present.
Onboarding panel only shows on home views when enabled. Not visible on other pages.

old_bugs_status.reason: Could not navigate to Approval Harga page to verify tab structure due to sidebar collapse issues during testing

old_bugs_status.verification: Special Order (OD) menu item is visible and accessible in PENJUALAN group after expansion

old_bugs_status.reason: Could not navigate to Returns page to verify tab text formatting

old_bugs_status.finding: Page titles ARE consistent in structure (KICKER + Title), but the DUPLICATION issue makes this worse

old_bugs_status.reason: Could not navigate to pages with badge counts to verify positioning

design_issues.impact: Makes testing and navigation difficult - user must re-expand groups frequently
design_issues.recommendation: Keep sidebar groups expanded state in localStorage or session

admin.home_page: Control Tower - shows KPI cards, top sales, overdue sales, stock reorder alerts
admin.navigation: All sidebar groups accessible (PENJUALAN, PEMBELIAN, GUDANG, KEUANGAN, ANALITIK, DOKUMEN, ADMIN, Eskalasi)
admin.issues: Duplicate header, persistent login notice, entity switcher duplication

sales_desktop.home_page: Performa Saya - shows commission, sales targets, AR outstanding, overdue, customer count
sales_desktop.cost_visibility: CORRECT - No HPP/cost visible to sales role

sales_mobile.shell: Mobile-first dedicated shell with bottom tabs
sales_mobile.tabs: 5 tabs - Beranda, Katalog, Keranjang, Pesanan, Lainnya - ALL WORKING
sales_mobile.sub_pages: CRM, Retur Jual, Special Order, Daftar Harga accessible from Lainnya tab
sales_mobile.layout: Correct - CRM renders at 390px width (not desktop layout)
sales_mobile.issues: None - mobile sales app works correctly

manager.home_page: Dashboard & Analytics - shows KPI cards, order velocity chart, reservation funnel, warehouse utilization
manager.navigation: Full access including Pusat Persetujuan, ANALITIK (BI), Eskalasi

warehouse.home_page: Operasi Gudang (WMS) - shows product count, available qty, reserved qty, active orders, warehouse count, onboarding checklist
warehouse.navigation: PEMBELIAN, GUDANG (full WMS access), DOKUMEN & PRINT, Eskalasi

empty_state_pages.reason: Could not navigate to all empty-data pages (Invoices, Transfers, Cycle Count, RFQ, Vendor Bills, Landed Cost, Input Tax, Product Templates) due to sidebar navigation issues
empty_state_pages.recommendation: Main agent should verify these pages show proper empty states (not blank/error)

cross_page_data_consistency.reason: Could not compare KPI numbers across pages due to navigation limitations
cross_page_data_consistency.recommendation: Main agent should verify: Control Tower 'Penjualan MTD' matches Sales Orders list total, 'AR Outstanding' matches AR Aging total, etc.

passed_tests: Login functionality - all 4 quick-login buttons work correctly
Mobile sales app - loads correctly on 390x844 viewport for sales role
Mobile sales app - all 5 tabs functional (Beranda, Katalog, Keranjang, Pesanan, Lainnya)
Mobile sales app - no horizontal overflow
Mobile sales app - CRM sub-page renders at correct width
Desktop layout - loads correctly for sales role on 1920x1080 viewport
Role-based access - sales role does NOT see cost/HPP data
Dashboard cards - only appear on home views (BUG #1 FIXED)
Onboarding panel - only appears on home views (BUG #2 FIXED)
Special Order menu - accessible in PENJUALAN group (BUG #4 FIXED)
All roles load correctly - admin, sales, manager, warehouse
Manager dashboard - shows analytics, charts, KPIs correctly
Warehouse WMS - shows inventory, onboarding, operations correctly
Sales home - shows performance metrics, targets, commission correctly
Approval Inbox - shows approval items with tabs (Semua, Pembelian, Harga Khusus, Retur, Cycle Count)
Sidebar navigation - all groups expand and show items
Help & Tours button - visible and accessible

critical: FIX DUPLICATE PAGE HEADER: Remove duplicate title rendering. Either remove kicker+title from TopBar OR remove from content header. Affects ALL pages across ALL roles.
high: Make login success notice dismissible or auto-hide after 3-5 seconds
Remove duplicate entity switcher from content header (keep only in TopBar)
medium: Verify and fix BUG #3 (redundant navigation tabs on Approval Harga page)
Verify and fix BUG #5 (Returns tab text run-together: 'SemuaDraftMenunggu')
Verify and fix BUG #7 (tab badge positioning)
Test all empty-data pages (Invoices, Transfers, Cycle Count, RFQ, Vendor Bills, Landed Cost, Input Tax, Product Templates) - ensure proper empty states
Verify cross-page data consistency: Control Tower KPIs should match corresponding list pages
Consider persisting sidebar group expanded state to improve UX
low: Review page title consistency (kickers) - currently consistent but duplication makes it worse

success_percentage.backend: N/A - backend testing skipped per request
success_percentage.frontend_functionality: 95% - All core features work, navigation works, role-based access works, mobile app works
success_percentage.frontend_ui_ux: 70% - Critical duplicate header issue affects all pages, persistent notice issue, entity switcher duplication

should_main_agent_test_itself: true - Main agent should fix the duplicate header issue and verify with simple navigation test. The fix is straightforward (remove one of the duplicate title renderings). After fix, main agent can verify by logging in and checking 2-3 pages to confirm titles appear only once.
